LanguageData.MeleeWeapon_Shellsplitter.label: Shellsplitter Laser Blade
LanguageData.MeleeWeapon_Shellsplitter.description: High-frequency energy blade mounted on Shellsplitter for close-quarters disruption attacks.
LanguageData.Shell_TW_Antiparticle_Rail_Mortar.label: HE Tactical Warhead
LanguageData.Shell_TW_EMP_Rail_Mortar.label: EMP Tactical Warhead
LanguageData.TW_Antiparticle_Rail_Mortar.label: Miniature Nuclear Projector
LanguageData.TW_Antiparticle_Rail_Mortar.description: Dubbed "Avatar of Annihilation," this orbital artillery system deploys when Doxa-0 anchors. Fires miniature nuclear warheads via gravity rails, bypassing shields, structural barriers, and energy shielding with delayed impact sequencing.
